final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit SRAM with read and write capabilities. It has a 4-bit address bus, a 16-bit data bus, a read enable signal, a write enable signal, and a clock signal. Data can be written to specific addresses when the write enable is low, and data can be read from specific addresses when the read enable is low.
module SRAM_16bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire read_enable,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [15:0]; // 16 words of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            memory[address] <= data_in; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (read_enable) begin
            data_out <= memory[address]; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule
